title: Fantasy Metals
description: Fantasy ores and gems, tools and armor.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/550bc1edb643f0dd93681e5ab2ac680af173811c.png)

# About

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26dc4745a4a642f42437bc950a1164ac290ae4e.png)](https://discord.gg/cD4Tdc2K7p) 
[![Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c55d1662f20982c4d553bc04c104aeb1c6046d.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fantasy-metals) 
[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e50de828605ad88bbcec961863811685c045a67f.png)](https://ko-fi.com/teamsolar)

Fantasy Metals introduces four new metals and five new gems found across all the dimensions: Overworld, Nether, and End. These unique materials come from myths and legends, and are designed to add variety to weapons, tools, and armor. This allows players to choose gear that suits their preferred playstyle.

## Features
- Nice designed vanilla-like balance 
- Wide range of weapons, tools and armor for different situations and play styles
- Fancy vanilla-like textures
  
## Translations:
This mod has translations in **English | Russian** languages.

Want to contribute? Suggest translations on our [Github project page](https://github.com/TeamSolarMC/Fantasy-Metals)

## Content
### Metals:
- Adamant
> Adamant is a legendary metal prized for its incredible durability and resistive properties.
- Orichalcum
> Orichalcum is a magical relative of copper which holds a far sharper edge than most metals.
- Mythril
> Mythril is a legendary metal famed for its pure appearance and light weight that belies its power.
- Carmot
> Carmot is a strange ruby metal which seems to absorb blood to grow stronger.

### Gems:
- Alexandrite
> A beautiful gemstone which shines blue or teal under different lighting.
- Black Opal
> A sparkling gemstone which shines in a rainbow of colors as you move it around.
- Sardonyx
> A shimmering form of onyx that has turned bright reddish-orange. Common in deserts.
- Tanzanite
> A lustrous gemstone which pulses from red to purple depending on the angle you view it.
- Tsavorite
> A rare form of garnet which is a brilliant green color. Almost looks like an emerald.

# FAQ
**Q:** Can I use this mod into my modpack?\
**A:** Yes! 

**Q:** Will you make a Fabric port?\
**A:** No, we don't have such plans now.

**Q:** Will you make a backport?\
**A:** Nope, we prefer to keep our attention to the latest versions.

**Q:** Does this work on X version?\
**A:** Try it and see! If it does, please comment so I can mark it. 

**Q:** Do you have a Patreon, or similar means of supporting your work?\
**A:** We have [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/teamsolar) if you want to support work of our team.
